name: UBA : Account or Group or Privileges Added
notes:
This event detects when a user performs an action that adds a user account or group or policy and dispatches an IBM Sense event to increment the originating user's risk score.

    Clients wishing to tune the impact of this rule on users' overall risk scores may consider modifying the building block rule "BB:UBA : Authentication User or Group or Policy Added" by adding event categories of interest to their organization.
bb_references: BB:UBA : Authentication User or Group or Policy Added
conditions_text: when an event matches all of the following UBA : Common Event Filters, BB:UBA : Authentication User or Group or Policy Added
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Account or Group or Privileges Added on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches all of the following UBA : Common Event Filters, BB:UBA : Authentication User or Group or Policy Added
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Account or Group or Privileges Added
Event description: senseValue=5,senseDesc='User has performed an account modification action.',usecase_id='069ef417-aaae-4442-83eb-989f8c94dacf'
